tweet.text:
.@AnthropicAI jumping from 18.4% to 29.8% on APEX Agents in a few months is insane.

This benchmark demonstrates it's ability to create real deliverables such as slide decks, documents, financial models in consulting, law, and banking.

It requires navigating complex data rooms with hundreds of files in Google Workspace.

The economic impact will be enormous.
